name: MaSIF-neosurf
description: Surface-based protein design for ternary complexes.. From a protein structure MaSIF computes a molecular surface discretized as a mesh. Then, MaSIF applies a geometric deep neural network to these patches.. Surface fingerprints trained only on proteins can be applied to neosurfaces emerging from small molecules. MaSIF processes the input PDB by creating a triangulated molecular surface and computing surface features. It then finds complementary seeds, refines them into motifs, searches a structural database for scaffolds, grafts the seeds, and refines the scaffolds to produce the final design.. Experimental, features will be generated but full embeddings not currently supported.
capabilities: Surface-based protein design for ternary complexes.
From a protein structure MaSIF computes a molecular surface discretized as a mesh. Then, MaSIF applies a geometric deep neural network to these patches.
Surface fingerprints trained only on proteins can be applied to neosurfaces emerging from small molecules

MaSIF processes the input PDB by creating a triangulated molecular surface and computing surface features. It then finds complementary seeds, refines them into motifs, searches a structural database for scaffolds, grafts the seeds, and refines the scaffolds to produce the final design.
Experimental, features will be generated but full embeddings not currently supported

pdbFile.description: Input protein structure in PDB format for surface-based design

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target protein

numDesigns.description: Number of scaffold designs to generate
